description: Policy for mock/fake/stub usage in src/tests with explicit allowlist + waivers.

allowlist_entries.reason: Protocol test hooks use mock terminology for documented session-state probes, not incomplete production behavior.
allowlist_entries.revisit_condition: Revisit when session protocol test helpers are renamed or moved.

allowlist_entries.reason: Unix ancillary-data fixtures are documented kernel-boundary examples rather than runtime stubs.
allowlist_entries.revisit_condition: Revisit when ancillary-data conformance coverage is split into tests.

allowlist_entries.reason: Certificate planning text uses stub/mock words in proof descriptions, not fake execution paths.
allowlist_entries.revisit_condition: Revisit when plan certificate proof wording is normalized.

allowlist_entries.reason: Remote runtime examples include mock labels for deterministic peer fixtures.
allowlist_entries.revisit_condition: Revisit when remote peer fixtures are moved under tests.

allowlist_entries.reason: Obligation-table tests use mock labels for deterministic obligation records.
allowlist_entries.revisit_condition: Revisit when obligation fixtures are renamed away from mock terminology.

allowlist_entries.reason: Region-table tests use mock labels for deterministic region records.
allowlist_entries.revisit_condition: Revisit when region fixtures are renamed away from mock terminology.

allowlist_entries.reason: io_uring fallback wording is tracked by the reactor platform support work, not hidden fake behavior.
Test logging helper lives under src for crate reuse and only names test doubles.
allowlist_entries.revisit_condition: Revisit when shared test support moves out of runtime source.

allowlist_entries.reason: Transport mock export is separately cfg-gated by scripts/scan_stubs.sh.
allowlist_entries.revisit_condition: Revisit when transport mock module is retired or test-only.

allowlist_entries.reason: Transport tests use mock terminology for deterministic in-memory peers.
allowlist_entries.revisit_condition: Revisit when transport tests are moved under tests/.

allowlist_entries.reason: gRPC E2E coverage uses named mock services as intentional test doubles.
allowlist_entries.revisit_condition: Revisit when gRPC E2E doubles are renamed or replaced by fixture servers.

allowlist_entries.reason: HTTP shutdown coverage uses mock labels for deterministic server fixtures.
allowlist_entries.revisit_condition: Revisit when HTTP shutdown fixture naming is normalized.

allowlist_entries.reason: Property tests use synthetic region-operation fixtures and are not production placeholders.
allowlist_entries.revisit_condition: Revisit when property fixture names are normalized.

allowlist_entries.reason: Recovery-security tests use mock labels for adversarial fixtures.
allowlist_entries.revisit_condition: Revisit when recovery fixtures are renamed away from mock terminology.

waivers.reason: Phase-0 Kafka API surface intentionally uses stub implementations until real transport completion.
Phase-0 consumer path is intentionally stubbed; tracked for replacement in coverage closure.
The uring module is a documented stub gate and is intentionally tracked as technical debt.
Platform fallback/stub export remains while deterministic cross-platform support is hardened.
Platform fallback/stub export remains while deterministic cross-platform support is hardened.
